tools.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's travel preferences including preferred cabin class, budget range, travel interests, preferred regions, dietary restrictions, and accessibility needs. Use this to personalize trip recommendations.

tools.description: Retrieve full details for a specific trip by its ID. Returns the trip info along with its destination, flight bookings, hotel bookings, itinerary (with daily activities), and payment records. Use this to inspect or summarize a user's trip.
tools.name: get_trip_details

tripId.description: The unique ID of the trip to retrieve

tools.description: Update an existing trip by ID. Supports updating destination, title, and dates. Returns the updated trip summary. Note: trip status is computed automatically from dates and cannot be set directly.
tools.name: update_trip

tripId.description: The unique trip ID to update.

destinationId.description: Optional destination ID to associate with the trip.

startDate.description: Optional trip start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

endDate.description: Optional trip end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.description: Ask the user to confirm an action before proceeding. Use this before any irreversible action like booking or cancellation. The graph will pause until the user responds.
tools.name: request_confirmation

action.description: Short action label (e.g. 'Book flight', 'Cancel hotel booking')

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what will happen if confirmed

details.description: Structured details about the action (booking info, prices, etc.)

tools.description: Request payment from the user for a booking. Use this after the user confirms a booking to initiate the Stripe payment flow. The graph will pause until payment is completed or cancelled.
tools.name: request_payment

bookingType.description: The type of booking being paid for

bookingId.description: The booking ID to pay for

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the payment (e.g. 'Flight to Tokyo - $450')

tools.description: Specialist for discovering and recommending travel destinations. Handles destination search, details, and personalized recommendations.
tools.name: transfer_to_destination_agent

tools.description: Specialist for searching, comparing, and booking flights. Handles flight search, booking, and cancellation.
tools.name: transfer_to_flight_agent

tools.description: Specialist for searching, comparing, and booking hotels. Handles hotel search, booking, and cancellation.

tools.description: Specialist for creating and managing day-by-day trip itineraries. Handles itinerary creation, day planning, and activity scheduling.
tools.name: transfer_to_itinerary_agent

tools.description: Search TripLoom destinations with optional filters for free-text terms, region, country, and highlight. Returns paginated results with `data`, `hasMore`, and `nextCursor` for sequential page retrieval.
tools.name: search_destinations

search.description: Optional search text (e.g., 'beach city', 'ski', 'food scene'). Full-text matches destination content.

highlight.description: Optional travel-interest filter to narrow destinations by highlight (e.g., beaches, food, nightlife).

limit.description: Optional page size (1-100). Defaults to 20 if omitted.

cursor.description: Optional pagination cursor from a previous response `nextCursor` to fetch the next page.

tools.description: Retrieve full destination details by ID, including metadata and related top hotels for that destination.
tools.name: get_destination_details

destinationId.description: The unique ID of the destination to inspect in detail.

tools.description: Get personalized destination recommendations for the authenticated user based on their saved travel preferences and prior behavior signals. Each result includes `matchReason` and `matchScore` to explain why it was recommended.
tools.name: get_recommended_destinations

limit.description: Optional number of recommendations to return (1-20). Defaults to 10.

tools.description: Present destination options to the user as a visual selection widget. Use this after searching destinations to let the user pick interactively. After calling this tool, keep follow-up text short and do not restate full option details already shown in the widget.
tools.name: suggest_destinations

id.description: The destination ID from the search results

destinations.description: The list of destinations to present to the user

content.text:
**June 14–June 30 is a great time for Zanzibar**—it’s right at the start of the **long dry season (June–October)**, which is widely considered the best overall window for beach time and outdoor activities. ([zanzibartourism.go.tz](https://zanzibartourism.go.tz/when-to-go?utm_source=openai))

What you can generally expect in **mid–late June**:
- **Weather:** Mostly dry, lower humidity, and comfortably warm (often described as the “cooler, dry” season). ([zanzibartourism.go.tz](https://zanzibartourism.go.tz/when-to-go?utm_source=openai))  
- **Snorkeling/diving:** **Good-to-excellent visibility** and calmer conditions compared with the rainy months; many guides specifically call **June–October** prime for underwater activities. ([zanzibartourism.go.tz](https://zanzibartourism.go.tz/when-to-go?utm_source=openai))  
- **Crowds/prices:** June is typically the **start of peak season**, so it can be busier than May, but usually not as intense as later in July/August.

One nuance: early June can sometimes still see a bit of leftover rain from the long rains tapering off, but by **mid-June** it’s generally much drier. ([ng.tzembassy.go.tz](https://www.ng.tzembassy.go.tz/uploads/Master_Plan_Report.pdf?utm_source=openai))

If you tell me whether you want **more snorkeling (reef trips)** or **more hiking/nature**, I can suggest which **coast/area** of Zanzibar fits best for your June dates.

1) Do you want **1** or **2** dedicated snorkeling days (reef/sandbank trips)?  
2) For hiking/nature, do you prefer **easy scenic walks** or **more strenuous** (longer/steeper) outings?
